name: Charcoal Grilled Shiitakes
recipeIngredient: Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the shiitake mushrooms.
2. Remove and discard the mushroom stems.
3. Toss the mushrooms with the remaining ingredients, including olive oil, tamari sauce, crushed garlic, minced rosemary, salt, black pepper, maple syrup, and sesame oil (if using).
4. Marinate for 5 minutes.
5. Grill the shiitake caps over hot coals until lightly charred.
6. Serve immediately.
